name: Kotta Pilafi (Chicken Pilaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute chicken breasts in butter until golden brown.
2. Add onion, canned tomatoes, water, ground cinnamon, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add rice and stir to mix evenly. Cover and simmer for an additional 20 minutes, or until rice is tender, adding more water if necessary.
5. Serve with a bowl of cold dairy sour cream, spooned over the hot pilaf.
Makes 6 servings.
